requirements.summary: Display transaction history panel below archived holdings showing all buy and sell transactions with comprehensive details
acceptanceCriteria: Transaction list appears as a new section below archived holdings
Displays all transactions in a table format with clear column headers
Buy transactions are visually distinguished from sell transactions (e.g., colored badges)
Shows formatted dates, currency values, and share quantities
Transactions are sorted by date with newest first

file_operations.description: Add useGetAllTransactions React Query hook that fetches transaction history from the backend getAllTransactions method. Include proper enabled state based on actor availability and authentication. Return transaction data with isLoading, isError, and error states for UI consumption.

Create a new panel component that displays all buy and sell transactions in a table format. Include columns for asset symbol, company name (if available from context), transaction type with colored badges (green for buy, red for sell), shares quantity, price per share, date/time formatted using date utilities, and total value formatted as currency. Implement loading skeleton states matching the pattern used in ArchivedHoldingsPanel. Show an empty state message when no transactions exist. Use the useGetAllTransactions hook to fetch data and handle loading/error states. Sort transactions by date with newest first. Apply consistent styling with existing panels using Card components and table layouts.

Import and render the TransactionHistoryPanel component below the ArchivedHoldingsPanel in the authenticated dashboard layout. Maintain the existing grid layout structure and spacing to ensure the new panel integrates seamlessly with the existing UI hierarchy.
